body.title: Upstream LLM prompt shape — thinking-frame, not answer
body.result: TUTOR_DIRECTIVE constant + mode='tutor'|'answer' param on reasoning_context. Tutor is default; asks LLM for thinking-frame (questions, options, considerations) not direct answer. Answer mode preserved for translation/summarization. 8 tests. Commit 321b5c3b.
body.description:
When Igor invokes an upstream LLM (for reasoning assistance when his own confidence is low), today's prompts ask for answers ("what should Igor say to this?"). That lets Igor copy-paste LLM output and skips real reasoning. Shift prompt shape to tutor-mode: "what reasoning moves would help Igor work through this? What questions should he ask himself? What options is he likely missing?" Returns a thinking-frame, not an answer. Igor has to APPLY the frame, which forces actual reasoning and generates richer learning signal (reasoning-shapes transfer across domains in ways output-patterns don't).

**Affected files:** `wild_igor/igor/cognition/inference_openrouter.py` or wherever upstream reasoning prompts are composed — discovery step early in sprint; likely also `inference_gateway.py`; `tests/test_tutor_prompt.py` new.
**Design rules:** docs-in-code (the tutor-not-oracle principle is load-bearing — document in module docstring); test-plan-or-why-not (covered); oop-first.
**Scope boundary:** IN: replace answer-prompts with tutor-prompts for reasoning-assistance calls; keep answer-prompts for pure translation/summarization tasks (those don't benefit from tutor-mode); log mode chosen per call. OUT: the iterative tutor-chat (multi-round back-and-forth — future ticket if single-shot proves insufficient); tutor-cache of learned reasoning moves (follow-on — becomes habit tree entries).
**Test plan:** tutor-mode prompt contains framing questions not answer-directives; answer-mode preserved for translation/summary calls; mode selection gated on call-type; output parser handles thinking-frame shape (list of questions/considerations) vs answer shape (direct text); integration test runs live against a mock LLM verifying prompt shape.
